name: Organizr
description:
Homelab Services Organizer

Docs: https://docs.organizr.app/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  organizr:
    image: organizr/organizr:latest
    environment:
      - branch=${branch:-v2-master}
    volumes:
      - organizr-data:/config
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - curl -sf http://localhost:80 || exit 1
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 1s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42092:80
volumes:
  organizr-data: null
